notes: This contract records where maintainers must review native dependency advisories; it is not a vulnerability-free assertion.
A source contract does not replace built-artifact provenance, triage, remediation approval, or VEX decisions.

components.name: apache-subversion
components.reviewLimitation: Release review must check Subversion security guidance and release announcements for fixed CVEs affecting the locked version and SubversionR's use of libsvn.

advisorySources.purpose: Project security reporting and handling guidance.
Subversion release announcements and fixed-CVE notes.

components.name: apache-httpd
components.reviewLimitation: Release review must check Apache HTTP Server 2.4 vulnerability entries for the locked DAV fixture substrate version and enabled modules.

advisorySources.purpose: Apache HTTP Server 2.4 vulnerability index.
ASF CNA and vulnerability handling process.

components.name: pcre2
components.reviewLimitation: Release review must check the PCRE2 security policy and GitHub advisories for affected ranges and release-integrity notes.

advisorySources.purpose: PCRE2 security policy, previous vulnerabilities, and reporting guidance.
PCRE2 GitHub Security Advisories index.

components.name: serf
components.reviewLimitation: The Serf project site does not expose a dedicated versioned vulnerability index; release review must check Serf 1.3 changelog security-relevant entries, named CVE records, and remain manual/blocking for any other finding.

advisorySources.purpose: Apache Serf project home and relationship to Subversion/APR.
ASF CNA and vulnerability handling process.
Serf 1.3 release changelog with locked-version and security-relevant fix entries.
Named CVE record used for the Serf 1.3.10 terminal fixed review.

components.name: openssl
components.reviewLimitation: Release review must check OpenSSL vulnerability entries and security policy for the locked OpenSSL line and SubversionR's TLS usage.

advisorySources.purpose: OpenSSL vulnerability index and advisory links.
OpenSSL severity and vulnerability handling policy.

components.name: apr
components.reviewLimitation: The APR security page is reporting guidance rather than a versioned public advisory index; release review must check APR 1.7 changelog security entries, named CVE records, and remain manual/blocking for any other finding.

advisorySources.purpose: APR security reporting and vulnerability handling guidance.
ASF CNA and vulnerability handling process.
APR 1.7 release changelog with locked-version and security-fix entries.
Named CVE record used for the APR 1.7.6 terminal fixed review.
Named CVE record used for the APR 1.7.6 terminal fixed review.
Named CVE record used for the APR 1.7.6 terminal fixed review.
Named CVE record used for the APR 1.7.6 terminal fixed review.

components.name: apr-util
components.reviewLimitation: APR-util shares the APR security reporting path; release review must check APR-util 1.6 changelog security entries, named CVE records, and remain manual/blocking for any other finding.

advisorySources.purpose: APR security reporting and vulnerability handling guidance.
ASF CNA and vulnerability handling process.
APR-util 1.6 release changelog with locked-version and security-fix entries.
Named CVE record used for the APR-util 1.6.3 terminal fixed review.
Named CVE record used for the APR-util 1.6.3 terminal fixed review.

components.name: apr-iconv
components.reviewLimitation: APR-iconv shares the APR security reporting path; release review must check current APR-iconv release metadata, APR-iconv changelog entries, repository advisories, and vulnerability database query evidence before any terminal manual decision.

advisorySources.purpose: APR security reporting and vulnerability handling guidance.
ASF CNA and vulnerability handling process.
APR-iconv current recommended release metadata and Windows apr_xlate package context.
APR-iconv 1.2 release changelog for locked-version review.
Repository-published GitHub Security Advisories index for APR-iconv.
NVD keyword-search evidence for APR-iconv advisory discovery.
OSV package and repository query evidence for APR-iconv advisory discovery.

components.name: expat
components.reviewLimitation: The GitHub security overview has reporting guidance but no published advisory feed; release review must check the Expat changelog and remain manual/blocking.

advisorySources.purpose: Expat security policy and reporting guidance.
Expat release changelog with security-fix entries.

components.name: zlib
components.reviewLimitation: The project security page has no published advisory feed; release review must check release notes, project issue evidence, named CVE records, and remain manual/blocking for any other finding.

advisorySources.purpose: Project GitHub security overview records lack of published advisories/policy.
Project release notes for the locked source version.
Project issue tracking CVE-2026-22184 in the standalone contrib/untgz utility.
Named CVE record used for the zlib 1.3.2 terminal not_affected review.

components.name: sqlite-amalgamation
components.reviewLimitation: SQLite's official CVE page warns that third-party CVEs can be inaccurate or context-dependent; release review must check project context rather than treating CVE labels as final.

advisorySources.purpose: SQLite project CVE context and guidance.
SQLite release log for version-specific fixes.
